author: @Art-o-Games
text: A 91% chance of making it happen is damn good in any system.

author: @8ank3r
text: Great to know Rob.  But... what percentage of things you don't worry about turn around and bite you in the a&&  LOL Cheers

author: @scfcrob
text:
I wonder how many of the the remaining 8.6% who’s worries came true actually brought them on themselves? 
That can be defined as a success tbh as they got what they wished for!

author: @shm5547
text: Rapid iteration always beats a 'right first time' approach.

author: @synchro-dentally1965
text: I blame the popular movie A Christmas Story with the famous line "You'll shoot your eye out kid!" for why so many ppl worry. That and there was a big fear of quick sand during the 80s and 90s for some reason.

replies.author: @synchro-dentally1965
replies.text: Also about 90% of ppl are vitamin D3 deficient this time of year in the Northern Hemisphere.

author: @azlandpilotcar4450
text: Okay, but now someone will worry about the 9%

author: @zylascope
text: Yeah! Give it a go! Thanks Rob. ❤

author: @calvingreene90
text: 91% of what you worry about not happening just demonstrates that worrying works.

author: @frankfaubert1927
text: The folks that commented on the skater bearings, do they not know where these bearings are used? I could be wrong here but, I'm fairly sure a fully grown human will probably weigh more than a few kilograms.

author: @billy-go9kx
text: Thank you for the pep talk.

author: @bertoldriesenteil1430
text: He hit the nail on the head as always. This is pure wisdom.

author: @aceadman
text:
The world is constantly telling us the glass is half empty. Thats why I love your channels. They are the antidote. 😊👍👍

On the other hand, a 1 in 10 chance of getting your hand caught in a blender is too high an odds for me! 🤣

replies.author: @AutoNomades
replies.text: But why would you get your hand in a blender ? You have a VERY MUCH MORE chance to get harm in a classical road accident than anything else... But do you avoid roads ?

replies.author: @aceadman
replies.text: @AutoNomades I just mean that if I left a blender plugged in while I cleaned it out, and the odds of me getting my hand cut up were only 9%, I’d still want to unplug it. 😊

author: @justtinkering6713
text:
Its the stuff in-between the worries that actually happens. Need to be prepared for those also.
I have a new turbine up.
